description: Owned quality and automation for a GIS platform, supporting regular releases through broad UI/backend coverage, CI execution, visual regression testing, and deployment support.
highlights: Owned quality and test automation for a multi-platform GIS application, supporting monthly releases across web and backend systems
Built and maintained a Selenium-based BDD test suite (1,300+ tests) covering critical application workflows and data validation
Designed and operated a Selenium Grid with Jenkins-based CI jobs executing across multiple environments, browsers, and operating systems
Implemented visual regression testing to validate UI integrity and ensure availability of rendered geospatial data
Developed CI/CD pipelines for the web client and managed production deployments and hotfix releases
